data.body:
I like the new System framing, but calling it "artificial cognition" seems the wrong name... isn't it more like "external cognition?"

Like when we trust a bus driver to follow a route, a spouse to remember things, or a doctor to judge medical advice.

AI illiteracy is then dangerous overuse of S3.
